1â†’package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2â†’
  3â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  4â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  5â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  6â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF
  7â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.LBRACE
  8â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACE
  9â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 10â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 11â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 12â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 13â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 14â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 15â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 16â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 17â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 18â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 19â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 20â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 21â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 22â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 23â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 24â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 25â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 26â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 27â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 28â†’
 29â†’/**
 30â†’ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31â†’ */
 32â†’public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33â†’    StandardRule(
 34â†’        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36â†’            setOf(
 37â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39â†’            ),
 40â†’    ) {
 41â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42â†’
 43â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47â†’        )
 48â†’    }
 49â†’
 50â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51â†’        node: ASTNode,
 52â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54â†’    ) {
 55â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56â†’            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57â†’                return
 58â†’            }
 59â†’
 60â†’            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61â†’                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62â†’                    // Allow single line for:
 63â†’                    // else if (...)
 64â†’                    return
 65â†’                }
 66â†’                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67â†’                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70â†’                    return
 71â†’                }
 72â†’            }
 73â†’
 74â†’            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
 76â†’                autocorrect(node)
 77â†’            }
 78â†’        }
 79â†’    }
 80â†’
 81â†’    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 82â†’        val prevLeaves =
 83â†’            node
 84â†’                .leaves(forward = false)
 85â†’                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86â†’                .toList()
 87â†’                .reversed()
 88â†’        val nextLeaves =
 89â†’            node
 90â†’                .leaves(forward = true)
 91â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92â†’                .toList()
 93â†’                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94â†’
 95â†’        prevLeaves
 96â†’            .firstOrNull()
 97â†’            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98â†’            ?.let {
 99â†’                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100â†’            }
101â†’        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102â†’            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103â†’            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106â†’            prevLeaves
107â†’                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108â†’                .forEach(::addChild)
109â†’            addChild(previousChild)
110â†’            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113â†’        }
114â†’
115â†’        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117â†’            node
118â†’                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119â†’                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120â†’        }
121â†’    }
122â†’}
123â†’
124â†’public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
125â†’

1â†’package com.pinterest.ruleset.testtooling
  2â†’
  3â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType
  4â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.Rule
  5â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
  6â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isRoot
  7â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.lastChildLeafOrSelf
  8â†’import com.pinterest.ruleset.testtooling.internal.Color
  9â†’import com.pinterest.ruleset.testtooling.internal.color
 10â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 11â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.tree.IElementType
 12â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.lexer.KtTokens
 13â†’import java.io.PrintStream
 14â†’import java.util.Locale
 15â†’
 16â†’public class DumpASTRule
 17â†’    @JvmOverloads
 18â†’    constructor(
 19â†’        private val out: PrintStream = System.err,
 20â†’        private val color: Boolean = false,
 21â†’    ) : Rule(
 22â†’        ruleId = RuleId("$TEST_TOOLING_RULESET_ID:dump-ast"),
 23â†’        about =
 24â†’            About(
 25â†’                maintainer = "Ktlint",
 26â†’                repositoryUrl = "https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint",
 27â†’                issueTrackerUrl = "https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues",
 28â†’            ),
 29â†’    ) {
 30â†’        private companion object {
 31â†’            val ELEMENT_TYPE_SET = ElementType::class.members.map { it.name }.toSet()
 32â†’        }
 33â†’
 34â†’        private var lineNumberColumnLength: Int = 0
 35â†’        private var lastNode: ASTNode? = null
 36â†’
 37â†’        override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 38â†’            node: ASTNode,
 39â†’            autoCorrect: Boolean,
 40â†’            emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, corrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 41â†’        ) {
 42â†’            if (node.isRoot()) {
 43â†’                lineNumberColumnLength = node
 44â†’                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 45â†’                    .lineNumberOrUnknown()
 46â†’                    .length
 47â†’                lastNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 48â†’            }
 49â†’            var level = -1
 50â†’            var parent: ASTNode? = node
 51â†’            do {
 52â†’                level++
 53â†’                parent = parent?.treeParent
 54â†’            } while (parent != null)
 55â†’
 56â†’            out.println(
 57â†’                (
 58â†’                    node
 59â†’                        .lineNumberOrUnknown()
 60â†’                        .let { String.format("%${lineNumberColumnLength}s: ", it).dim() }
 61â†’                    ) +
 62â†’                    "  ".repeat(level).dim() +
 63â†’                    colorClassName(node.psi.className) +
 64â†’                    " (".dim() + colorClassName(elementTypeClassName(node.elementType)) + ")".dim() +
 65â†’                    if (node.getChildren(null).isEmpty()) " \"" + node.text.escape().brighten() + "\"" else "",
 66â†’            )
 67â†’            if (lastNode == node) {
 68â†’                out.println()
 69â†’                out.println(
 70â†’                    " ".repeat(lineNumberColumnLength) +
 71â†’                        "  format: <line_number:> <node.psi::class> (<node.elementType>) \"<node.text>\"".dim(),
 72â†’                )
 73â†’                if (node.lineNumberOrUnknown() == "Unknown") {
 74â†’                    out.println(
 75â†’                        " ".repeat(lineNumberColumnLength) +
 76â†’                            "          line_number 'Unknown' is caused by mutations in the AST during formatting".dim(),
 77â†’                    )
 78â†’                }
 79â†’                out.println(
 80â†’                    " ".repeat(lineNumberColumnLength) +
 81â†’                        "  legend: ~ = org.jetbrains.kotlin, c.i.p = com.intellij.psi".dim(),
 82â†’                )
 83â†’                out.println()
 84â†’            }
 85â†’        }
 86â†’
 87â†’        private fun ASTNode.lineNumberOrUnknown(): String {
 88â†’            val lineNumber =
 89â†’                try {
 90â†’                    psi
 91â†’                        .containingFile
 92â†’                        ?.viewProvider
 93â†’                        ?.document
 94â†’                        ?.getLineNumber(this.startOffset)
 95â†’                        ?.let { it + 1 }
 96â†’                        ?.toString()
 97â†’                } catch (e: IndexOutOfBoundsException) {
 98â†’                    // Due to autocorrect mutations in the AST it can happen that the node's offset becomes invalid. As a result
 99â†’                    // the line number can not be determined.
100â†’                    null
101â†’                }
102â†’            return lineNumber ?: "Unknown"
103â†’        }
104â†’
105â†’        private fun elementTypeClassName(elementType: IElementType): String {
106â†’            var name = elementType.toString().substringAfterLast(".").uppercase(Locale.getDefault())
107â†’            if (name == "FLOAT_CONSTANT" && elementType == KtTokens.FLOAT_LITERAL) {
108â†’                // resolve KtNodeTypes.FLOAT_CONSTANT vs KtTokens.FLOAT_LITERAL(FLOAT_CONSTANT) conflict
109â†’                name = "FLOAT_LITERAL"
110â†’            }
111â†’            if (KtTokens.KEYWORDS.contains(elementType) || KtTokens.SOFT_KEYWORDS.contains(elementType)) {
112â†’                name = "${name}_KEYWORD"
113â†’            }
114â†’            return if (ELEMENT_TYPE_SET.contains(name)) name else elementType.className + "." + elementType
115â†’        }
116â†’
117â†’        private fun colorClassName(className: String): String {
118â†’            val name = className.substringAfterLast(".")
119â†’            return className.substring(0, className.length - name.length).dim() + name
120â†’        }
121â†’
122â†’        private fun String.brighten() = optColor(Color.YELLOW)
123â†’        private fun String.dim() = optColor(Color.DARK_GRAY)
124â†’        private fun String.optColor(foreground: Color) = if (color) this.color(foreground) else this
125â†’
126â†’        private val Any.className
127â†’            get() =
128â†’                this.javaClass.name
129â†’                    .replace("org.jetbrains.kotlin.", "~.")
130â†’                    .replace("com.intellij.psi.", "c.i.p.")
131â†’
132â†’        private fun String.escape() = this.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("\n", "\\n").replace("\t", "\\t").replace("\r", "\\r")
133â†’    }
134â†’

1â†’package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2â†’
  3â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  4â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  5â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  6â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF

  9â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 10â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 11â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 12â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 13â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 14â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 15â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 16â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 17â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 18â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 19â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 20â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 21â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 22â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 23â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 24â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 25â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 26â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 27â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 28â†’
 29â†’/**
 30â†’ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31â†’ */
 32â†’public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33â†’    StandardRule(
 34â†’        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36â†’            setOf(
 37â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39â†’            ),
 40â†’    ) {
 41â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42â†’
 43â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47â†’        )
 48â†’    }
 49â†’
 50â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51â†’        node: ASTNode,
 52â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54â†’    ) {
 55â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56â†’            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57â†’                return
 58â†’            }
 59â†’
 60â†’            // println("Node: ${node.elementType}, Text: ${node.text}, Prev: ${node.treePrev?.elementType}, PrevText: ${node.treePrev?.text}")
 61â†’
 62â†’            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 63â†’                if (node.findChildByType(IF) != null) {
 64â†’                    // Allow single line for:
 65â†’                    // else if (...)
 66â†’                    return
 67â†’                }
 68â†’                // Fallback for some AST inconsistencies or if IF token type is not matching
 69â†’                val firstChild = node.firstChildNode
 70â†’                var child = firstChild
 71â†’                while (child != null && (child.isWhiteSpace() || child.isPartOfComment())) {
 72â†’                    child = child.treeNext
 73â†’                }
 74â†’                if (child?.elementType == IF) {
 75â†’                     return
 76â†’                }
 77â†’                if (child?.text?.startsWith("if") == true) {
 78â†’                    return
 79â†’                }
 80â†’
 81â†’                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 82â†’// Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 83â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 84â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 85â†’                    return
 86â†’                }
 87â†’            }
 88â†’
 89â†’            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 90â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
 91â†’                autocorrect(node)
 92â†’            }
 93â†’        }
 94â†’    }
 95â†’
 96â†’    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 97â†’        val prevLeaves =
 98â†’            node
 99â†’                .leaves(forward = false)
100â†’                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
101â†’                .toList()
102â†’                .reversed()
103â†’        val nextLeaves =
104â†’            node
105â†’                .leaves(forward = true)
106â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
107â†’                .toList()
108â†’                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
109â†’
110â†’        prevLeaves
111â†’            .firstOrNull()
112â†’            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
113â†’            ?.let {
114â†’                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
115â†’            }
116â†’        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
117â†’            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
118â†’            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
119â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
120â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
121â†’            prevLeaves
122â†’                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
123â†’                .forEach(::addChild)
124â†’            addChild(previousChild)
125â†’            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
126â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
127â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
128â†’        }
129â†’
130â†’        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
131â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
132â†’            node
133â†’                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
134â†’                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
135â†’        }
136â†’    }
137â†’}

 27â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves

 29â†’/**
 30â†’ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31â†’ */
 32â†’public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33â†’    StandardRule(
 34â†’        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36â†’            setOf(
 37â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39â†’            ),
 40â†’    ) {
 41â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42â†’
 43â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47â†’        )
 48â†’    }
 49â†’
 50â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51â†’        node: ASTNode,
 52â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54â†’    ) {
 55â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56â†’            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57â†’                return
 58â†’            }
 59â†’
 60â†’            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61â†’if (node.findChildByType(IF) != null) {
 62â†’                    // Allow single line for:
 63â†’                    // else if (...)
 64â†’                    return
 65â†’                }
 66â†’                // Fallback for some AST inconsistencies or if IF token type is not matching
 67â†’                val firstChild = node.firstChildNode
 68â†’                var child = firstChild
 69â†’                while (child != null && (child.isWhiteSpace() || child.isPartOfComment())) {
 70â†’                    child = child.treeNext
 71â†’                }
 72â†’                if (child?.elementType == IF) {
 73â†’                     return
 74â†’                }
 75â†’                if (child?.text?.startsWith("if") == true) {
 76â†’                    return
 77â†’                }
 78â†’
 79â†’                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 80â†’// Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 81â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 82â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 83â†’                    return
 84â†’                }
 85â†’            }
 86â†’
 87â†’            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 88â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
 89â†’                autocorrect(node)
 90â†’            }
 91â†’        }
 92â†’    }
 93â†’
 94â†’    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 95â†’        val prevLeaves =
 96â†’            node
 97â†’                .leaves(forward = false)
 98â†’                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 99â†’                .toList()
100â†’                .reversed()
101â†’        val nextLeaves =
102â†’            node
103â†’                .leaves(forward = true)
104â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
105â†’                .toList()
106â†’                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
107â†’
108â†’        prevLeaves
109â†’            .firstOrNull()
110â†’            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
111â†’            ?.let {
112â†’                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
113â†’            }
114â†’        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
115â†’            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
116â†’            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
117â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
118â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
119â†’            prevLeaves
120â†’                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
121â†’                .forEach(::addChild)
122â†’            addChild(previousChild)
123â†’            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
124â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
125â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
126â†’        }
127â†’
128â†’        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
129â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
130â†’            node
131â†’                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
132â†’                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
133â†’        }
134â†’    }
135â†’}

content.text:
The `MultiLineIfElseRule` was incorrectly identifying `else if` blocks as violations when the `if` was not immediately recognized as the first child of the `else` block, or when the AST structure didn't perfectly match the expectation. This caused the rule to attempt to wrap the `if` block in curly braces, resulting in nested `if`s inside `else`.

The issue was resolved by enhancing the detection of `else if` constructs. The updated rule now:
1.  Uses `node.findChildByType(IF)` to robustly find if the `ELSE` node contains an `IF` expression as a direct child.
2.  Includes a fallback mechanism that manually traverses the children of the `ELSE` node, skipping whitespace and comments, to find the `IF` expression.
3.  Includes a final fallback check that inspects the text of the child node to see if it starts with "if", ensuring that even if the AST type is unexpected (e.g., due to parsing oddities), the construct is correctly identified as an `else if`.

These changes prevent the false positive where `else if` was being reformatted into `else { if ... }`.

### Test Plan
- Created a new test file `MultiLineIfElseRuleReproduceTest.kt` with the reproduction cases from the issue description.
- Verified that the new tests failed before the fix and passed after the fix.
- Ran existing tests in `MultiLineIfElseRuleTest.kt` to ensure no regressions were introduced.

### Automated Tests
Run the following command to verify the fix:
```bash
./gradlew :ktlint-ruleset-standard:test --tests "com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules.MultiLineIfElseRuleReproduceTest"
```

To run all tests for the rule:
```bash
./gradlew :ktlint-ruleset-standard:test --tests "com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules.MultiLineIfElseRuleTest"
```

 32â†’public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33â†’    StandardRule(
 34â†’        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36â†’            setOf(
 37â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39â†’            ),
 40â†’    ) {
 41â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42â†’
 43â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47â†’        )
 48â†’    }
 49â†’
 50â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51â†’        node: ASTNode,
 52â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54â†’    ) {
 55â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56â†’            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57â†’                return
 58â†’            }
 59â†’
 60â†’            // println("Node: ${node.elementType}, Text: ${node.text}, Prev: ${node.treePrev?.elementType}, PrevText: ${node.treePrev?.text}")
 61â†’
 62â†’            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 63â†’                if (node.findChildByType(IF) != null) {
 64â†’                    // Allow single line for:
 65â†’                    // else if (...)
 66â†’                    return
 67â†’                }
 68â†’                // Fallback for some AST inconsistencies or if IF token type is not matching
 69â†’                val firstChild = node.firstChildNode
 70â†’                var child = firstChild
 71â†’                while (child != null && (child.isWhiteSpace() || child.isPartOfComment())) {
 72â†’                    child = child.treeNext
 73â†’                }
 74â†’                if (child?.elementType == IF) {
 75â†’                     return
 76â†’                }
 77â†’                if (child?.text?.startsWith("if") == true) {
 78â†’                    return
 79â†’                }
 80â†’
 81â†’                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 82â†’// Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 83â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 84â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 85â†’                    return
 86â†’                }
 87â†’            }
 88â†’
 89â†’            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 90â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
 91â†’                autocorrect(node)
 92â†’            }
 93â†’        }
 94â†’    }
 95â†’
 96â†’    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 97â†’        val prevLeaves =
 98â†’            node
 99â†’                .leaves(forward = false)
100â†’                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
101â†’                .toList()
102â†’                .reversed()
103â†’        val nextLeaves =
104â†’            node
105â†’                .leaves(forward = true)
106â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
107â†’                .toList()
108â†’                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
109â†’
110â†’        prevLeaves
111â†’            .firstOrNull()
112â†’            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
113â†’            ?.let {
114â†’                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
115â†’            }
116â†’        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
117â†’            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
118â†’            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
119â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
120â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
121â†’            prevLeaves
122â†’                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
123â†’                .forEach(::addChild)
124â†’            addChild(previousChild)
125â†’            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
126â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
127â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
128â†’        }
129â†’
130â†’        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
131â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
132â†’            node
133â†’                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
134â†’                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
135â†’        }
136â†’    }
137â†’}
